data.title: Care Denied: West Virginia's Ban on Methadone Clinics Blocks Life-Saving Medicine
data.summary: The ACLU is suing the state of West Virginia for its moratorium on clinics providing methadone, an opioid treatment that cuts the risk of overdose deaths in half.

data.title: Drones for Intimidation
data.summary: Despite talk of "drones for good" from boosters, we're seeing a new, darker law enforcement “use case” for the technology

data.title: 'I Have No Rights': Minnesota Residents Sue Trump Administration for Racial Profiling, Stops Without Suspicion, and Warrantless Arrests
data.summary: Immigration arrests have upended life in Minnesota as citizens detail unlawful and violent interactions with ICE in court testimonies as part of an ACLU lawsuit against the Trump administration.

data.title: One Year Later: Georgetown Scholar Illegally Detained for His Speech Returns to Court
data.summary: The ACLU is in court this week with Dr. Badar Khan Suri fighting the Trump administration’s unconstitutional attempt to re-detain him for exercising his First Amendment rights.

data.title: Trump is Attacking a Crucial Fair Housing Rule that Protects Against Discrimination
data.summary: The disparate impact rule is a long-held housing protection for survivors of domestic violence, women of color and other marginalized groups. The Department of Housing and Urban Development has announced plans to end the policy.
